summary.key_theme: 比特幣價格在 65,000 美元關卡震盪，市場在聯準會降息預期帶來的資金流入與技術性回調壓力之間拉鋸。

bullish.title: Bitcoin Price to $500K or $1M? Larry Fink Says ‘Very Bullish’ as BlackRock Clients Buy $139M BTC
bullish.reason: 貝萊德執行長 Larry Fink 對比特幣長期前景表達強烈看好，且機構客戶持續買入 1.39 億美元，顯示長期資金配置信心。

bullish.title: Crypto ETFs End 8-Week Outflow Streak With $282M Inflows as Bitcoin and Ethereum Demand Rebounds
bullish.reason: 加密貨幣 ETF 終結連續 8 週的資金流出，錄得 2.82 億美元淨流入，顯示市場需求回溫。

bullish.title: Bitcoin Tops $65,000 as dovish Fed remarks and soft inflation data lift prices
bullish.reason: 美國通膨數據疲軟降低了聯準會升息預期，有利於風險資產表現，直接推動比特幣價格突破 65,000 美元。

bearish.title: ‘BlackRock Dumped $185M in Bitcoin’ Claim Fuels ETF Panic as Trading Hits Cycle Lows
bearish.reason: 市場出現關於貝萊德拋售比特幣的傳言，引發投資人恐慌，導致交易量降至週期低點。

bearish.title: A Concerning Development For Bitcoin: Extended Chain Split
bearish.reason: 由於 BIP 110 軟分叉帶來的不確定性，分析師將比特幣評級從「強力買入」下調至「買入」。

bearish.title: Bitcoin Breaks Tech Stocks Correlation: Will BTC Now Follow in Gold's Footsteps?
bearish.reason: IBIT 的回調被視為可能進入類似黃金的繁榮-蕭條週期，暗示短期內可能面臨較長的修復期。

neutral.title: Bitcoin Is its Most Affordable in Two Years. Which ETF Is Better to Invest With Now: iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF or VanEck Bitcoin ETF?
neutral.reason: 文章旨在比較 IBIT 與其他競爭對手 ETF 的優劣，並未對 IBIT 本身給出明確的買賣建議，僅提供投資者參考。

neutral.title: Bitwise Bitcoin ETF: Efficient Execution, But Distribution Matters
neutral.reason: 分析指出 Bitwise 在費用與價差上與 IBIT 等龍頭產品競爭，屬中性產業競爭分析。
